flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Snow College fell 100% between 2020 and 2023 (83.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Snow College fell 39% between 2020 and 2023 (66.1% → 40.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Snow College rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($6.2k → $7.0k).
